case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS LENHEIM & MITCHELL INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,242.06 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT LENHEIM & MITCHELL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LENHEIM & MITCHELL INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LENHEIM & MITCHELL INC. $1,242.06 PRINCIPAL, $37.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,279.06 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFENDANT RETURN UNABLE TO FORWARD.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT LENHEIM & MITCHELL INC. HEARING SET FOR JUN-30-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAY-24-1993 AS TO DEFENDANT LENHEIM & MITCHELL INC.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUN-30-1993, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM JUN-30-1993 TO JUL-14-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06 AS TO DEFENDANT LENHEIM & MITCHELL INC.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUL-14-1993, NO APPEARANCE, ORDER OF ARREST TO ISSUE, BAIL $500.00, AS TO DEFENDANT LENHEIM & MITCHELL INC.
